body:
## Summary
- Add focused `validate-content` exits for `--focus-audio-button-accessibility` and `--focus-speech-runtime-parity`.
- Expand AudioButton and speech runtime parity coverage for play/stop lifecycle, playback rate handling, lifecycle callbacks, and synchronous `Speech.speak` errors.
- Wire Practice to the existing listen-first/rate-aware audio path and expose the Settings listen-first switch; consolidate the duplicate `LegalPage` import that blocked lint.

## Validation
- `NODE_OPTIONS='--v8-pool-size=1' node scripts/validate-content.js --focus-audio-button-accessibility`
- `NODE_OPTIONS='--v8-pool-size=1' node scripts/validate-content.js --focus-speech-runtime-parity`
- `NODE_OPTIONS='--v8-pool-size=1' node scripts/validate-content.js --focus-settings-store`
- `NODE_OPTIONS='--v8-pool-size=1' node --test tests/content-audio-button-accessibility-parity.test.js tests/content-speech-runtime-parity.test.js tests/content-test-script-routing.test.js tests/content-settings-audio-parity.test.js`
- `NODE_OPTIONS='--v8-pool-size=1' npm run test:audio`
- `NODE_OPTIONS='--v8-pool-size=1' npm run validate:content`
- `NODE_OPTIONS='--v8-pool-size=1' npm run typecheck -- --pretty false`
- `NODE_OPTIONS='--v8-pool-size=1' npm run lint`
- `NODE_OPTIONS='--v8-pool-size=1' npm run test:ownership`
- `npx --no-install prettier --check 'app/(tabs)/practice.tsx' app/settings.tsx app/sources.tsx scripts/validate-content.js tests/content-audio-button-accessibility-parity.test.js tests/content-speech-runtime-parity.test.js tests/content-test-script-routing.test.js && git diff --check`

## Known Broader Suite Status
- `NODE_OPTIONS='--v8-pool-size=1' npm run test:content` still exits 1 on widespread existing current-main contract drift unrelated to this atom, including production-summary count mismatches, ad placement/app-config/content naturalness guards, dashboard/theme/UHRReferenceCard expected-count drift, and `content-validator-schema-drift` expecting `validate:content` to remain red even though it is now green.
title: test: focus audio speech parity gates
